title: CBRE Property Longlist canonical dataset
description: The single source of truth a run produces. Field names map 1:1 to the dashboard template's render JS, so the injector is a pure pass-through. Unknowns are explicit sentinels ('tbd', '—', null), never invented and never dropped.

meta.description: Audit + hero/footer config. Not rendered as data; hero strings feed the {{tokens}}.

hero.description: Fills the project-specific {{tokens}} in the template. KPI tokens are computed by build_dashboard.py and need not be supplied here.

requirements.description: Client questionnaire requirements (size/must-haves). Populated by the spine from an xlsx questionnaire (merge --requirements); the orchestrator uses them for the size-slider default and hard-requirement flags. Not injected into the HTML.

property.description: One property option. 'required' = the chrome breaks without it.

landlord.description: The owner / asset manager / freeholder of an existing building - a DISTINCT party from the developer. Optional (a property may have only a developer, or only a landlord); 'tbd' when unknown. Surfaced in the detail modal + compare table, gated by FIELD_PRESENT so it renders nowhere when no input carried it.

officeAreaVal.description: Office GLA as a clean number in the dataset's area unit, derived by merge from officeArea for total-GLA rent maths. Null when unparseable/absent.

warehouseRentVal.description: Headline warehouse rent as an ANNUAL per-area figure IN ITS OWN CONVENTION (the number shown in warehouseRent): €/m²/yr for metric sources, £/sq ft/yr for UK sources (rentUnit names it). A monthly quote must be annualised x12 before it is stored here. Currency is never converted.

rentUnit.description: Rent quoting convention as 'currency/per-area/yr' (e.g. '£/sq ft/yr', '€/sq m/yr'). Absent = the €/sq m/yr default. Source conventions are KEPT.

areaUnit.description: The dataset's area unit (merge stamps the DOMINANT source unit on every property; minority-unit records convert arithmetically with a provenance note).

officeRentVal.description: Office rent as an ANNUAL per-area numeric in the property's own convention (rentUnit), derived by merge from officeRent for the total-rent split. Null when absent/unparseable.

photo.description: data:image/...;base64,... or a placeholder data URI. This is the HERO (gallery[0]).

gallery.description: Up to GALLERY_MAX photo data URIs for the carousel, best-first (photographic_score), hero first. PAGE-SCOPED so a multi-property deck contributes only this property's photos. Always contains at least [photo]; the carousel falls back to [photo] when absent.

plan.description: A site-plan image data URI. merge.py harvests it from the brochure page (page_plan: balanced white/ink signature; the hyperlinked location map and boilerplate are excluded); a standalone plan file bound by the orchestrator (extract_image.py kind=plan) takes precedence. On a plan-only page the plan also serves as the hero.

district.description: ORCHESTRATOR-FILLED: optional local labour-market micro-profile from research. The deterministic spine does not populate it; region-level workforce data lives in top-level regions{} via enrich --regions.

region.description: Workforce/labour profile. Every figure pairs with an *AsOf date and a sources citation; a missing figure stays null, never invented.
